title: SEO Strategy Basics: How H1 Tags, Meta Titles, and Meta Descriptions Actually Drive Patient Traffic - regtekconsulting.com
metaDescription: Your H1 tags, meta titles, and meta descriptions are the first things Google reads and the first things patients see—yet most healthcare websites get them wrong. Here's how to fix the basics that drive real organic traffic.
ogTitle: SEO Strategy Basics: How H1 Tags, Meta Titles, and Meta Descriptions Actually Drive Patient Traffic - regtekconsulting.com
ogDescription: Your H1 tags, meta titles, and meta descriptions are the first things Google reads and the first things patients see—yet most healthcare websites get them wrong. Here's how to fix the basics that drive real organic traffic.

bodyContent:
7 Conversion Killers on Healthcare Websites
Kevin
March 5, 2026 
No Comments
Healthcare websites often lose potential patients due to preventable design and usability mistakes. Learn the seven most common conversion killers and how to fix them.
Read more
